<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **Refactor**
  - Improved the engine’s error estimation by shifting from a humidity-based approach to one that emphasizes vertical motion dynamics.
  - Enhanced documentation to clarify updates regarding mass flux derivatives and Jacobians.
  - Incremented the reference counter to reflect changes in behavior.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
title: add mass flux derivative with respect to grid-mean u_3
